Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's so hard to decide what to get when there's so many cakes to choose from.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm going to try the cheese tart. Oh, um... Did that "Amant" cake catch your interest, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}You've been awfully friendly with different girls lately, haven't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I was just teasing you about your taste in cakes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}This cake is called "Amant," which means "paramour" in French.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}They say it's so sweet it makes you forget all about your real lover.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}It's a pretty clever name, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not great at small talk, but this cake makes a nice conversation starter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems to be having a lot of fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5092 0 0}Um... Should I take your silence as a ye— Er, never mind...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}I was actually talking about the cake.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}You see, it's called "Amant," meaning "paramour" in French.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}Sorry... I didn't expect you to have one... Or several...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems to be feeling awkward.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5057 0 0}{f 5 13 3 15 6}Oh, um, I was just teasing you about your taste in cakes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}It's called "Amant," which means "paramour" in French.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}They say it's so sweet it makes you forget all about your real lover.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}It's a pretty clever name, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems to be having fun...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5096 0 0}Eating something sweet can help alleviate exhaustion. Maybe I'll buy some desserts for everyone at the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Will you help me choose some on our way out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We picked out some cakes together[n]and headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
